title: Gimme A Cheese With Nothin'
about: Gimme A Cheese With Nothin' is a catchphrase and exploitable format taken from a commercial for Polly-O String Cheese from the 1980s, which later became a meme in 2023. The line has been used as an exploitable that adds various text to screencaps from the original commercial, and has also been used to make fan reanimations of the commercial.
origin:
The commercial first aired sometime in the 1980s and was posted to YouTube[1] on July 19th, 2008, by user TheBigBlackNinja.

In the commercial, three kids go to a pizzeria and tell the man at the counter, named Fred, to give them a pizza with extra cheese, but hold the tomato sauce and crust. Fred looks at them in disbelief and turns back to tell the pizza chef behind him, who is named Jimmy, to "Gimme a cheese with nothin'!" Jimmy looks back, also in disbelief, and replies, "Nothin'!?"
